title: EX Pluralis
description: A mod that adds a few things...
body:
![Presentation Image](https://i.imgur.com/UlROEd4.png)

EX Pluralis is a mod that adds a lot of features.

\-New ores.  
\-Technological blocks.  
\-Levels system.  
\-Perks  
\-A new dimension.

And more.

The mod focuses on experience levels and miner/crafter/hunter/survivor levels that are added to the game, allowing you to obtain perks, upgrade your tools/armors or combine them together to benefit from multiple effects.

I wanted to create more than just another "ores mod" with MCreator. Since September 2022, I've been working on this project and I hope you will enjoy playing this mod as much as I put effort into it.

If you have experienced bugs or other problems with this mod, please let me know so I can work on a fix as soon as I can.

__**See images below for more details on different technological blocks:**__

![Informations about Merger and Enhancer](https://i.imgur.com/m28K0Mh.png)

![Informations about Enhancer perks](https://i.imgur.com/R3lprBm.png)

![Informations about Accelerator block](https://i.imgur.com/XB80bsy.png)

![Informations about Recycler, Repairer, Absorber and Experience Bank](https://i.imgur.com/vqnqFue.png)

![Informations about Alza Furnace, Levitators, Converter and Chests](https://i.imgur.com/7MaoyGg.png)

![Informations about Vending Machines and Experience Sugar Cane](https://i.imgur.com/26DQu1A.png)

![Informations about Boxes, Speed Block and Shurikens](https://i.imgur.com/S3MYTQD.png)
